fix1_task2_observe_methods.target: observeDefaultModelId(): Flow<String> and observeLastUsedModelId(): Flow<String> added to AppSettingsRepository
evidence: Task 2 Description explicitly describes both Flow<String> methods as required by Task 11 for reactive star indicator
Task 2 What-to-do step 2 lists both methods in the interface extension: 'fun observeDefaultModelId(): Flow<String>' and 'fun observeLastUsedModelId(): Flow<String>'

Task 2 AC line: 'observeDefaultModelId(): Flow<String> and observeLastUsedModelId(): Flow<String> are non-suspend, backed by dataStore.data.map { ... } with a catch { e: IOException -> ... } operator on the flow'
Task 2 TDD Anchor includes 3 tests: observeDefaultModelId_emitsCurrentValue, observeLastUsedModelId_emitsCurrentValue, observeDefaultModelId_emitsEmptyString_whenUnset
Task 2 Details/DefaultAppSettingsRepository section specifies the flow implementation pattern with catch operator

fix2_task3_wave_depends_on_modelid.target: Task 3 wave=2, depends_on=[2], activeModelName emits model.modelId not model.name
evidence: Task 3 frontmatter: wave: 2, depends_on: [2] — correctly set
Task 3 Description: 'emits the model.modelId (the stable HF id) ... not model.name (the display name). This distinction is critical'

Task 3 TDD Anchor test activeModelName_emitsModelIdWhenModelBecomesReady: 'equals that entry's model.modelId (the stable HF id, NOT model.name). Example: if model.modelId == "litert-community/gemma-4-E4B-it-litert-lm" and model.name == "Gemma 4 E4B", the emitted value must be "litert-community/gemma-4-E4B-it-litert-lm"'
Task 3 AC: 'activeModelName emits the model.modelId (stable HF id, not display name) of the currently Ready model'
Task 3 Details/DefaultModelRegistry.kt section: 'Use _models.map { list -> list.firstOrNull { it.initStatus === ModelInitStatus.Ready }?.model?.modelId } ... Note: .model?.modelId — not .model?.name'
Task 3 Implementation hints: 'Use model.modelId, not model.name. ... Emitting model.name instead would silently break the chat.model_id == activeModelName.value comparison'

fix3_task5_isWarmupInProgress.target: isWarmupInProgress: StateFlow<Boolean> added to WarmupCoordinator spec
evidence: Task 5 What-to-do step 4: 'Add isWarmupInProgress: StateFlow<Boolean> as a public property backed by a private MutableStateFlow<Boolean> initialised to false. Set it to true when a warmup Job is launched and back to false in a finally {} block'

Task 5 AC: '[ ] isWarmupInProgress: StateFlow<Boolean> is true while a warmup coroutine is active and false when idle, completed, or cancelled — transitions via a finally {} block so cancellation always resets the flag'
Task 5 TDD Anchor: 3 dedicated tests — isWarmupInProgress_emitsTrue_duringWarmup, isWarmupInProgress_emitsFalse_afterCompletion, isWarmupInProgress_emitsFalse_afterCancellation

Task 5 Details/WarmupCoordinator.kt section: 'isWarmupInProgress: StateFlow<Boolean> is backed by private val _isWarmupInProgress = MutableStateFlow(false). Set _isWarmupInProgress.value = true immediately before launching ... wrap the coroutine body in try { … } finally { _isWarmupInProgress.value = false }. Task 10 (ChatScreen TopAppBar) depends on this flow'
Round-1 major finding about missing isWarmupInProgress: fully resolved

fix4_task13_modelentry_predicate.target: ModelEntry.isDownloaded replaced with correct predicate entry.downloadStatus.status == ModelDownloadStatusType.SUCCEEDED
evidence: Task 5 What-to-do step 5: 'collect registry.models, for each emission check if any ModelEntry has entry.downloadStatus.status == ModelDownloadStatusType.SUCCEEDED'

Task 5 Details/WarmupCoordinator.kt: 'For AC-F3: check entry.downloadStatus.status == ModelDownloadStatusType.SUCCEEDED — ModelEntry does not have an isDownloaded field; the download state is represented by entry.downloadStatus: ModelDownloadStatus'

Task 13 Focus area 1 audit checklist: 'Verify Task 4 added AC-F3 observer in WarmupCoordinator: collects registry.models, detects first entry where entry.downloadStatus.status == ModelDownloadStatusType.SUCCEEDED'
Task 9 Description and TDD Anchor: consistently use entry.downloadStatus.status == ModelDownloadStatusType.SUCCEEDED throughout
Task 7 Details/HomeViewModel.kt: uses entry.downloadStatus.status == ModelDownloadStatusType.SUCCEEDED predicate
No occurrence of ModelEntry.isDownloaded (non-existent field) found in any task after the fix
